title: Sealed Packet VI — Packet sixth under wafer
subtitle: Entered as sober truth, though truth oft weareth a counterfeit coat.

sections.heading: INNER ABSTRACT
sections.body:
The sealed files being synthesized, there emerges a masterfully deceptive concordance. The obvious path led straight to the louder grievances of debtors and patrons, engineered by an adversary who understood that public arguments are the most intoxicating lure for a constable's mind. One quiet evening visit thus sheltered the true executioner, and the desk was briefly blinded by the noisy disputes of the afternoon.

Entered as sober truth, though truth oft weareth a counterfeit coat.

The phrasing is too neat by half, which in murder-books is seldom a happy omen. The reader may think this intimate; the desk did not. They filed it beside blood, salt, and the ordinary treacheries of mankind.

sections.heading: FINAL SYNTHESIS OF EVIDENCE
sections.body:
Let the final tallies be laid bare, stripped of the misdirections left within the open logs. First: The toxic concentration of basic lead carbonate was added directly and exclusively to the victim's individual pour, leaving the central decanter completely untainted. Second: The fresh friction ridge impressions recovered from the decanter's glass stopper correspond uniquely to the visiting inspector's hand. Third: The secret ledger retrieved from the locked filing cabinet records exactly 487,000 francs in illicit transactions spanning two decades to the same official. Fourth: The final entry of the street-door log registers a terminal ingress at 19:05, directly preceding the sudden cessation of all activity within the atelier.

Desk mark: doubtful. The same mark is set upon papers later proved sound.

Methinks the paper smelleth of haste, candle grease, and a conscience unquiet. The reader may think this intimate; the desk did not. It is left solely to the examiner to bind these four loose threads into a single, unyielding knot.
